data.name: BDSM Sex - Episode 5
data.detailed_description:
A visual novel series with animations about a young woman exploring the world of BDSM. In this episode, Katy surrenders to both her Master and Mistress.

GAME DESCRIPTION

In episode five, Katy returns to her Master’s dungeon, excited to try new sensations.
To her surprise, she finds both her Master and Mistress Sam, with whom she had played in their last session.
The Master commands Sam to arouse Katy, leading to a wild scene under his watchful gaze.
With Katy both horny and curious, they move on to experimenting with various BDSM devices.
Follow the story to discover what else the two dominants have prepared for her.
We promise a story with arousing dialogue, realistic-looking characters, and high-definition graphics.

FEATURES

- HD renders and animations
- Video and image gallery

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: 2 GHz Dual Core
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Graphics card supporting DirectX 9.0c
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0c
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
  • 音效卡: Any
